United Nations (gang).description: The United Nations (UN) is a criminal gang formed in Abbotsford, British Columbia, Canada in 1997 by Clayton Roueche and a group of high-school friends. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, extortion, money laundering, murder, and other criminal activities. It operates primarily in Canada and the United States, with alliances with various Asian organized crime groups and the Sinaloa Cartel. The gang remains active as of the present.

Ghee Hin Kongsi.description: The Ghee Hin Kongsi was a Chinese secret society in Singapore and Malaya, formed in 1820. It was part of the Hongmen overseas network and provided mutual aid for Chinese migrants, aiming to overthrow the Qing dynasty. PDC (gang).description: The PDC was a street gang based in Brixton, London, England, primarily active in the 1990s. It was formed by local youths as a successor to the 28s gang and became the largest gang in the SW9 postcode. Members were involved in drug trafficking, robberies, and violence. The gang later reformed as a music collective and label, while a faction broke off to form the 'Muslim Boys'.

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are the precursors to the Dexter Boys, meaning the Dexter Boys succeeded them.
edges.evidence_quote: The Errol Flynns are recognized as the precursors to most, if not all, Detroit gangs that followed in their wake. Some of the most notable successors include the "Be Like Boys", "Dexter Boys" (an offshoot of YBI), "Schoolcraft Boys or SCB's", "SNS", "Fenkell Boys", "FMK" ("Fenkell Mafia Killers"), "7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs", "Linwood Boys", "Brewster Boys", "Jeffries Boys", and "8 Mile sconys", ("JBFL") "Joy Boys" or "Exit 9"
